description: Intent-only request: classify a fixed RSS-to-LinkedIn pipeline with one bounded LLM call as a workflow.

text: Whenever a new article hits our RSS feed, summarize it in two sentences and post the summary to LinkedIn.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the RSS summary pipeline as a deterministic workflow with a bounded LLM step.
The agent explains that the LLM only performs a fixed summarization task inside a fixed pipeline.
The agent does not classify the request as a full agent merely because an LLM is present.

executionScenarios.name: intent-only-response
executionScenarios.description: The agent should only classify intent; no executable workflow is expected
executionScenarios.dataSetup: No external data is required because this scenario is an intent-classification prompt.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The response classifies the request as a workflow and distinguishes a bounded LLM call from an agent.
